headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Builders FirstSource, Lowers Price Target to $87
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Sam Reid   maintains Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $120 to $87.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Builders FirstSource, Lowers Price Target to $114
summary: Barclays  analyst Matthew Bouley   maintains Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $124 to $114.
